meta.educational_goal: To demonstrate the operations of a Trie data structure interactively.

events.description: Inserts a word into the Trie.
evidence: insertBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w) { alert('Enter a word'); return; } const ok = trie.insert(w); pushHistory('insert ' + w); renderAll(); });

events.description: Deletes a word from the Trie.
evidence: deleteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } const ok = trie.delete(w); pushHistory('delete ' + w); renderAll(); });

events.description: Searches for a word in the Trie.
evidence: searchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } const found = trie.search(w); alert('Search: ' + w + ' -> ' + (found ? 'found' : 'not found')); renderAll(); });

events.description: Highlights the path of a word in the Trie.
evidence: highlightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } // find path and collect node ids ... renderAll(activeIds); });

events.description: Searches for words with a given prefix.
evidence: prefixSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const limit = Number(kInput.value) || 50; const results = trie.startsWith(p, limit); alert('Prefix results (' + results.length + '):\n' + results.slice(0,200).join('\n')); renderAll(); });

events.description: Suggests completions for a given prefix.
evidence: autoCompleteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const k = Number(kInput.value) || 10; const results = trie.startsWith(p, k); alert('Autocomplete top ' + k + ':\n' + results.join('\n')); renderAll(); });

events.description: Counts the number of words with a given prefix.
evidence: countPrefixBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const c = trie.countPrefix(p); alert('Prefix count for "' + p + '": ' + c); renderAll(); });

events.description: Inserts a batch of words into the Trie.
evidence: insertBatchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lines = batchInput.value.split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); if(lines.length === 0){ alert('No words to insert'); return; } trie.lastOperationLog = []; trie.steps = []; for(const w of lines){ trie.insert(w); } pushHistory('insert batch ' + lines.length + ' words'); renderAll(); });

events.description: Deletes a batch of words from the Trie.
evidence: deleteBatchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lines = batchInput.value.split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); if(lines.length === 0){ alert('No words to delete'); return; } trie.lastOperationLog = []; trie.steps = []; for(const w of lines){ trie.delete(w); } pushHistory('delete batch ' + lines.length + ' words'); renderAll(); });

events.description: Adds a specified number of random words to the Trie.
evidence: randomBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const n = Number(randN.value) || 10; const mn = Number(randMin.value) || 3; const mx = Number(randMax.value) || 8; const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'; const words = []; for(let i=0;i<n;i++){ const L = Math.floor(Math.random()*(mx-mn+1)) + mn; let s = ''; for(let j=0;j<L;j++) s += chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)]; words.push(s); trie.insert(s); } pushHistory('random add ' + n); alert('Added random words:\n' + words.join('\n')); renderAll(); });

events.description: Clears all words from the Trie.
evidence: clearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { if(!confirm('Clear the entire trie?')) return; importTrie({isCompressed:false, countWords:0, root:{id:1,char:'',isEnd:false,count:0,children:{}}}, trie); pushHistory('clear'); renderAll(); });

events.description: Exports the current Trie structure as JSON.
evidence: exportBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const obj = exportTrie(trie); jsonArea.value = JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2); });

events.description: Imports a Trie structure from JSON.
evidence: importBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { try{ const obj = JSON.parse(jsonArea.value); importTrie(obj, trie); pushHistory('import json'); renderAll(); } catch(e){ alert('Invalid JSON: ' + e.message); } });

events.description: Undoes the last operation.
Redoes the last undone operation.
Lists all words currently in the Trie.
evidence: listWordsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const words = trie.listAllWords(Number(maxResults.value) || 200); alert('Words (' + words.length + '):\n' + words.join('\n')); });

events.description: Finds the longest common prefix among all words in the Trie.
evidence: longestPrefixBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lcp = trie.longestCommonPrefix(); alert('Longest common prefix: "' + lcp + '"'); });

events.description: Compresses the Trie structure.
Decompresses the Trie structure.
Truncates the Trie to a specified number of nodes.
evidence: truncateBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const limit = Number(nodeLimit.value) || 500; const nodes = []; const q = [trie.root]; while(q.length && nodes.length < limit){ const n = q.shift(); nodes.push(n); for(const k in n.children) q.push(n.children[k]); } const words = trie.listAllWords(1000000).slice(0, Number(maxResults.value) || 10000); const t2 = new Trie(); for(const w of words){ t2.insert(w); if(countNodes(t2) >= limit) break; } importTrie(exportTrie(t2), trie); pushHistory('truncate to ' + limit + ' nodes'); renderAll(); });
insertBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w) { alert('Enter a word'); return; } const ok = trie.insert(w); pushHistory('insert ' + w); renderAll(); });
deleteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } const ok = trie.delete(w); pushHistory('delete ' + w); renderAll(); });

searchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } const found = trie.search(w); alert('Search: ' + w + ' -> ' + (found ? 'found' : 'not found')); renderAll(); });
highlightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const w = wordInput.value.trim(); if(!w){ alert('Enter word'); return; } // find path and collect node ids ... renderAll(activeIds); });

prefixSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const limit = Number(kInput.value) || 50; const results = trie.startsWith(p, limit); alert('Prefix results (' + results.length + '):\n' + results.slice(0,200).join('\n')); renderAll(); });

autoCompleteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const k = Number(kInput.value) || 10; const results = trie.startsWith(p, k); alert('Autocomplete top ' + k + ':\n' + results.join('\n')); renderAll(); });
countPrefixBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const p = prefixInput.value.trim(); const c = trie.countPrefix(p); alert('Prefix count for "' + p + '": ' + c); renderAll(); });

insertBatchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lines = batchInput.value.split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); if(lines.length === 0){ alert('No words to insert'); return; } trie.lastOperationLog = []; trie.steps = []; for(const w of lines){ trie.insert(w); } pushHistory('insert batch ' + lines.length + ' words'); renderAll(); });

deleteBatchBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lines = batchInput.value.split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); if(lines.length === 0){ alert('No words to delete'); return; } trie.lastOperationLog = []; trie.steps = []; for(const w of lines){ trie.delete(w); } pushHistory('delete batch ' + lines.length + ' words'); renderAll(); });

randomBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const n = Number(randN.value) || 10; const mn = Number(randMin.value) || 3; const mx = Number(randMax.value) || 8; const chars = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'; const words = []; for(let i=0;i<n;i++){ const L = Math.floor(Math.random()*(mx-mn+1)) + mn; let s = ''; for(let j=0;j<L;j++) s += chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)]; words.push(s); trie.insert(s); } pushHistory('random add ' + n); alert('Added random words:\n' + words.join('\n')); renderAll(); });

clearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { if(!confirm('Clear the entire trie?')) return; importTrie({isCompressed:false, countWords:0, root:{id:1,char:'',isEnd:false,count:0,children:{}}}, trie); pushHistory('clear'); renderAll(); });
exportBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const obj = exportTrie(trie); jsonArea.value = JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2); });

importBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { try{ const obj = JSON.parse(jsonArea.value); importTrie(obj, trie); pushHistory('import json'); renderAll(); } catch(e){ alert('Invalid JSON: ' + e.message); } });
listWordsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const words = trie.listAllWords(Number(maxResults.value) || 200); alert('Words (' + words.length + '):\n' + words.join('\n')); });
longestPrefixBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const lcp = trie.longestCommonPrefix(); alert('Longest common prefix: "' + lcp + '"'); });

truncateBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { const limit = Number(nodeLimit.value) || 500; const nodes = []; const q = [trie.root]; while(q.length && nodes.length < limit){ const n = q.shift(); nodes.push(n); for(const k in n.children) q.push(n.children[k]); } const words = trie.listAllWords(1000000).slice(0, Number(maxResults.value) || 10000); const t2 = new Trie(); for(const w of words){ t2.insert(w); if(countNodes(t2) >= limit) break; } importTrie(exportTrie(t2), trie); pushHistory('truncate to ' + limit + ' nodes'); renderAll(); });
<textarea id="batchInput" rows="4" cols="60" placeholder="one word per line"></textarea>
<textarea id="jsonArea" class="jsonout" placeholder="Exported JSON appears here"></textarea>
